message:
feat(agent): Implement structured JSON output for agents (raze)

Add comprehensive structured JSON output format for agent consumption:

- Add pt_version, timestamp fields at top level
- Add host object with hostname, cores, memory_total_gb, memory_used_gb, load_avg
- Add scan object with total_processes, candidates_found, scan_duration_ms
- Add evidence array to each candidate with factor, contribution, detail, strength
- Add age_seconds, age_human, memory_mb, cpu_percent, score to candidates
- Add recommendations object with kill_set, review_set, spare_set, expected_memory_freed_gb
- Add --minimal flag for reduced output (PIDs, scores, recommendations only)
- Add --pretty flag for pretty-printed JSON output

The output validates against the schema from the raze task requirements
and is fully parseable by jq. Streaming NDJSON mode for progress events
works for long-running scans.

Closes: process_triage-raze

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
